title: Pittsburgh Rail Ticket Under False Name
description: Found in Arden Gill's coat pocket or on the table at the Commercial Hotel: a pre-purchased one-way rail ticket for the 6 a.m. southbound consist to Pittsburgh, issued in the name 'A. Greer.' The ticket was purchased this afternoon at the depot window — the ticket agent remembers the transaction because the man paid in silver and asked specifically whether the consist would be on time. A man who planned to stay in Sandusky does not buy a dawn rail ticket the same afternoon he arranges an arrest.
